channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Monday offers Tyrique Stevenson an opportunity for redemption, one year after the play critics use to define him
item.description: Tyrique Stevenson has used the criticism he received from the "Fail Mary" play to become a better player, and has since earned Pro Football Focus's highest defensive grades among corners in Week 4.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: No. 24 South Florida scores 4 TDs in a 3 1/2-minute span and hands North Texas its 1st loss
item.description: DENTON, Texas (AP) — Byrum Brown threw three touchdown passes and ran for two more scores, Jhalyn Shuler returned a fumble 34 yards for South Florida's fourth TD in span of 3 1/2 minutes and the No. 24 Bulls beat North Texas 63-36 on Friday night, handing the Mean Green their first loss this season.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Growing wave of Minnesota school officials urge state to protect girls' sports as Trump's deadline arrives
item.description: Attorney General Keith Ellison defended transgender athlete policies as 245 Minnesota school board members demand Title IX compliance to protect girls' sports fairness.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Shedeur Sanders promoted to Browns backup QB, will be behind rookie Dillon Gabriel against Steelers
item.description: BEREA, Ohio (AP) — Shedeur Sanders has waited patiently for his chance to play for Cleveland. He's real close.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sister Jean, Loyola Chicago's beloved basketball chaplain and NCAA sensation, dies at 106
item.description: Sister Jean Dolores Schmidt, the beloved Loyola Chicago basketball chaplain who became famous during the team's 2018 Final Four run, has died at age 106.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Caleb Williams joins investment group backing NWSL's Boston Legacy FC
item.description: Caleb Williams and his investment firm, 888 Meidas, have joined the investment group of the Boston Legacy Football Club, a soon-to-be member of the National Women's Soccer League, alongside other notable athletes and celebrities.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Mark Sanchez case 'rubs me the wrong way:' Attorney Jose Baez
item.description: Celebrity attorney Jose Baez said that the drug test results requested by police will play a pivotal role in the Sanchez case.
item.dc:creator: Rob Taub, NewsNation

item.title: Bartender rendered aid to Mark Sanchez in Indianapolis stabbing
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS — Scott Bennett was closing up Loughmiller’s Pub & Eatery at 12:30 a.m. Saturday when an injured man started pounding on the bar’s window. "As I was closing, somebody was beating on the window, just a random person," Bennett said.
item.dc:creator: Russ McQuaid, NewsNation

item.title: Morse two-way star Superior Garror joins prestigious Silver Pigskin convo
item.description: Superior Garror of Morse High School has become one of the most dynamic two-way players in the county, accumulating 1,310 total yards and 16 touchdowns, and has been recruited by Delaware State head coach DeSean Jackson, Weber State and the University of Washington.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Breitenbach, Fox 5

item.title: Julio Rodríguez lifts Mariners over Tigers 3-2, Seattle takes Game 2 of ALDS to even series
item.description: Rodríguez hit a tiebreaking RBI double in the eighth inning and the Mariners beat the Detroit Tigers 3-2 in Game 2 of their AL Division Series on Sunday to even the series.
item.dc:creator: DOUG MILLER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Broncos rally from 14-point deficit to hand Eagles their first loss of the season, 21-17
item.description: Bo Nix led the Broncos on three scoring drives on three possessions in the fourth quarter, J.K. Dobbins rushed for a 2-yard score in the period and the Broncos wiped out a 14-point deficit to hand the Philadelphia Eagles their first loss of the season, 21-17.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Steven Fisk birdies his last 3 holes in Mississippi to win first PGA Tour title
item.description: Steven Fisk said he wasn't going to let anything get in the way of his first PGA Tour victory, and it took birdies on his last three holes Sunday to close with an 8-under 64 to win the Sanderson Farms Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ex-NFL quarterback Mark Sanchez stabbed multiple times in altercation leading to charges against him
item.description: Former NFL quarterback Mark Sanchez was pepper-sprayed and stabbed multiple times during a late-night altercation with a 69-year-old truck driver in a downtown Indianapolis alley, which resulted in criminal charges against the Fox Sports analyst, according to court records filed Sunday.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SCHREINER and MIKE MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 49ers' Christian McCaffrey call San Francisco 'San Fran' in new commercial
item.description: (KRON) — 49ers running back and former Stanford University standout Christian McCaffrey committed a Bay Area cultural faux pas in a new Lowe’s ad posted to social media on Oct. 1. “What’s up, San Fran?” Christian McCaffrey says in the advertisement.
item.dc:creator: John Ross Ferrara, KRON4

item.title: Local business funds CMU women's wrestling scholarship
item.description: Colorado Mesa University's women's wrestling program has received its first-ever scholarship thanks to a partnership with local business ProSpace and owner Dave Huerkamp.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Fast start propels Brewers to 9-3 victory over Cubs in NLDS opener
item.description: Chourio capped Milwaukee's six-run first inning with a two-run single, and the Brewers trounced the Chicago Cubs 9-3 on Saturday in Game 1 of their NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UFC fighter uses his parents' sacrifice as motivation in the cage
item.description: (NEXSTAR) -- For mixed martial artist Chris Gutierrez, fighting in the cage feels like home. “I wanted to be like Bruce Lee.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, NewsNation

item.title: Noem: NFL ‘won’t be able to sleep at night’ over Bad Bunny Super Bowl performance
item.description: The NFL has faced blowback from conservative commentators and MAGA influencers over its decision to select Bad Bunny as the halftime headliner.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation
